description: Cupcakes are small individual cakes baked in liners or molds and commonly topped with frosting. They are popular for parties, celebrations, and portion-controlled desserts.
preparation_steps: Portion the batter into lined cupcake tins.
Bake until set and lightly springy.
Top with frosting or other decorations.

nutrition.calories: Usually moderate to high per piece

health_advice.benefits: Single-serving size can help with portion control compared with a large cake.
health_advice.risks: Often high in sugar, especially when heavily frosted.
health_advice.healthy_tip: Choose simpler frostings or smaller portions when eating them regularly is a concern.

dietary_notes.note: Traditional cupcakes are usually vegetarian. Vegan and gluten-free versions are easy to make with substitutions.

allergens: Possible soy or nuts depending on recipe and toppings
